info.title: ComplexityRipper
info.description: A Roslyn-based code complexity analyzer that scans C# repos for long functions, high cyclomatic complexity, and deep nesting. Generates HTML reports with ADO/GitHub hyperlinks.

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Scan repositories and generate analysis JSON

options.name: --root
options.description: Root directory containing repos to analyze

options.name: --output
options.description: Output JSON file path [default: stats.json]

options.name: --include
options.description: Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped

options.name: --include-tests
options.description: Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate HTML report from analysis JSON

options.name: --input
options.description: Input JSON file path [default: stats.json]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output HTML file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]

options.name: --threshold-lines
options.description: Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]

options.name: --threshold-complexity
options.description: Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]

options.name: --theme
options.description: Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]

options.name: --repo-metadata
options.description: Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

commands.name: run
commands.description: Analyze repos and generate report in one step

options.name: --root
options.description: Root directory containing repos to analyze

options.name: --output
options.description: Output HTML report file path [default: code-complexity-report.html]

options.name: --stats
options.description: Intermediate stats JSON file path [default: stats.json]

options.name: --threshold-lines
options.description: Line count threshold for flagging functions [default: 200]

options.name: --threshold-complexity
options.description: Cyclomatic complexity threshold for flagging functions [default: 25]

options.name: --theme
options.description: Report theme: light, dark, high-contrast, ink [default: light]

options.name: --include
options.description: Regex to include repos (use | for OR). Only matching repo names are analyzed

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Regex to exclude repos (use | for OR). Matching repo names are skipped

options.name: --include-tests
options.description: Include test projects (excluded by default) [default: False]

options.name: --repo-metadata
options.description: Path to repo-metadata.json for lifecycle tags

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information
